151.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß clothed me in a thick Qubti garment that Dihya al-Kalbi had gifted him. I then dressed my wife in it. The Messenger of Allah ß said to me: "Why are you not wearing the Qubti?" I said: "I gave it to my wife." He said: "Tell her to put a lining beneath it, for I fear it may reveal the shape of her body."'
151.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß memberi pakaian kepadaku berupa kain Qubti tebal yang Dihyah al-Kalbi hadiahkan kepadanya. Kemudian aku pakaikan kepada istriku. Rasulullah ß berkata kepadaku: "Mengapa kamu tidak memakai kain Qubti?" Aku berkata: "Aku memberikannya kepada istriku." Beliau bersabda: "Katakan padanya agar memakai lapisan di bawahnya, karena aku khawatir ia menampakkan bentuk tubuhnya."'

152.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'A daughter of the Prophet ß sent word that her son was dying; come to us. The Prophet ß sent greetings of peace and said: "To Allah belongs what He has taken and what He has given, and everything before Him has its appointed time. So be patient and seek reward."'
152.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Seorang putri Nabi ß mengutus pesan bahwa anaknya sekarat; datanglah kepada kami. Nabi ß mengutus salam dan bersabda: "Milik Allah apa yang Dia ambil dan apa yang Dia berikan, dan segala sesuatu di sisi-Nya memiliki waktu yang telah ditentukan. Maka bersabarlah dan carilah pahala."'

153.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß carried him as pillion on the day of Arafah until they entered the mountain pass. Then he relieved himself, then performed ablution — not a full one — and then prayed Maghrib there.
153.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß membawanya berbonceng pada hari Arafah hingga mereka memasuki celah gunung. Kemudian beliau buang air kecil, lalu berwudhu — bukan wudhu yang lengkap — dan kemudian shalat Maghrib di sana.

154.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß used to fast on Mondays and Thursdays.
154.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß biasa berpuasa pada hari Senin dan Kamis.

155.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that a group of Quraysh came across him while they were gathered and sent two young men to ask him about the middle prayer. He said: 'It is Asr.' Two men from the Ansar approached him to confirm, and he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "It is the Asr prayer."'
155.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa sekelompok Quraisy menemuinya sementara mereka sedang berkumpul dan mengutus dua orang pemuda untuk menanyakannya tentang shalat wustha. Ia berkata: 'Itu adalah Ashar.' Dua orang dari Anshar mendekatinya untuk mengkonfirmasi, dan ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Itu adalah shalat Ashar."'

156.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I was the pillion rider of the Messenger of Allah ß when he departed from Arafat. His mount did not gallop at all until we reached Muzdalifa, where he prayed Maghrib and Isha combined with one adhan and two iqamas, without praying any nafl between them.'
156.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku adalah pembonceng Rasulullah ß ketika beliau berangkat dari Arafat. Tunggangannya tidak berlari sama sekali sampai kami tiba di Muzdalifah, di mana beliau shalat Maghrib dan Isya digabung dengan satu adzan dan dua iqamah, tanpa shalat sunnah di antara keduanya.'

157.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ß say: "A man will be brought who used to be obeyed in acts of disobedience to Allah. He will be thrown into Hell, and his intestines will pour out. He will go around them like a donkey goes around a millstone. The people of Hell will gather around him and say: O so-and-so, what happened to you? Were you not commanding us to do good and forbidding evil? He will say: I used to command you to do good but not do it myself, and I used to forbid you from evil but do it myself."'
157.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Seorang pria akan dibawa yang biasa dipatuhi dalam perbuatan maksiat kepada Allah. Ia akan dilemparkan ke dalam Neraka, dan ususnya akan keluar. Ia akan berkeliling di sekelilingnya seperti keledai mengelilingi kincir. Penghuni Neraka akan berkumpul di sekelilingnya dan berkata: Wahai si fulan, apa yang terjadi denganmu? Bukankah kamu memerintahkan kami untuk berbuat baik dan melarang kejahatan? Ia akan berkata: Aku biasa memerintahkan kalian untuk berbuat baik tetapi tidak melakukannya sendiri, dan aku biasa melarang kalian dari kejahatan tetapi melakukannya sendiri."'

158.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß said: 'Riba is in credit transactions (nasi'a).'
158.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß bersabda: 'Riba ada dalam transaksi kredit (nasi'ah).'

159.iwh_en: It was narrated that Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) told Ibn Zubayr that the Messenger of Allah ß said: 'Riba is only in credit transactions (nasi'a).' Ibn Abbas used to permit an exchange of dinar for dinar with an increase, and when this was brought to Ibn Zubayr he said: 'Ibn Abbas used to narrate what he did not hear directly.'
159.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) memberitahu Ibn Zubayr bahwa Rasulullah ß bersabda: 'Riba hanya ada dalam transaksi kredit (nasi'ah).' Ibnu Abbas biasa membolehkan pertukaran dinar dengan dinar dengan kelebihan, dan ketika hal ini disampaikan kepada Ibn Zubayr, ia berkata: 'Ibnu Abbas biasa meriwayatkan apa yang tidak ia dengar langsung.'

160.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß prayed inside the Ka'ba.
160.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß shalat di dalam Ka'bah.

161.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß said: 'If you hear that plague is in a land, do not go to it; and if it strikes a land while you are there, do not flee from it.'
161.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß bersabda: 'Jika kalian mendengar bahwa wabah ada di suatu wilayah, janganlah pergi ke sana; dan jika ia menyerang suatu wilayah sementara kalian berada di sana, janganlah melarikan diri darinya.'

162.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Umayma, the daughter of Zaynab, was brought to the Messenger of Allah ß, her soul rattling in her chest like an old leather flask. He said: "To Allah belongs what He has taken and what He has given; everything before Him has an appointed term. So be patient and seek reward."'
162.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Umaimah, putri Zainab, dibawa kepada Rasulullah ß, ruhnya bergejolak di dadanya seperti kantong kulit tua. Beliau bersabda: "Milik Allah apa yang Dia ambil dan apa yang Dia berikan; segala sesuatu di sisi-Nya memiliki ajal yang telah ditetapkan. Maka bersabarlah dan carilah pahala."'

163.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that it was said to him: 'Why don't you go and speak to this man (Uthman)?' He said: 'Do you think I am not speaking to him unless you can hear? By Allah, I have spoken to him privately without opening a matter that I would not want to be the first to open.'
163.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dikatakan kepadanya: 'Mengapa kamu tidak pergi dan berbicara kepada pria ini (Utsman)?' Ia berkata: 'Apakah kalian berpikir aku tidak berbicara kepadanya kecuali agar kalian mendengar? Demi Allah, aku telah berbicara kepadanya secara pribadi tanpa membuka perkara yang tidak ingin aku jadikan orang pertama yang membukanya.'

164.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that Abu al-Sha'tha' said: 'I went on Hajj. I entered the Ka'ba and when I was between the two pillars, I went forward and pressed against the wall. Then Ibn Umar came and prayed four rak'ahs beside me. When he finished, I told him that Usama ibn Zayd had told me that the Messenger of Allah ß had prayed there.'
164.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Abu al-Sya'tsa' berkata: 'Aku pergi haji. Aku masuk ke Ka'bah dan ketika berada di antara dua tiang, aku maju dan menempel pada dinding. Kemudian Ibn Umar datang dan shalat empat raka'at di sampingku. Setelah selesai, aku memberitahunya bahwa Usamah ibn Zayd memberitahuku bahwa Rasulullah ß telah shalat di sana.'

165.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß sent us in a raiding party to al-Huraqa. We found them and they ran away. We caught a man. When we closed in on him, he said: "There is no god but Allah." I stabbed him. I then felt unsettled about it in my heart, so I mentioned it to the Messenger of Allah ß. He said: "Did he say there is no god but Allah and you killed him?" He kept repeating this until I wished I had only become a Muslim that day.'
165.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß mengutus kami dalam pasukan ke al-Huraqa. Kami menemukan mereka dan mereka melarikan diri. Kami menangkap seorang pria. Ketika kami mendekatinya, ia berkata: "Tidak ada tuhan selain Allah." Aku menusuknya. Kemudian aku merasa tidak tenang tentang hal itu dalam hatiku, maka aku menyebutkannya kepada Rasulullah ß. Beliau bersabda: "Apakah ia mengucapkan tidak ada tuhan selain Allah dan kamu membunuhnya?" Beliau terus mengulang ini sampai aku berharap aku baru saja masuk Islam pada hari itu.'

166.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß departed from Arafah while I was his pillion rider. He began to restrain his mount so much that its neck almost touched its chest, saying: "O people, be calm! Devotion is not achieved by rushing."'
166.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß berangkat dari Arafah sementara aku adalah pemboncengnya. Beliau mulai menahan tunggangannya sedemikian rupa sehingga lehernya hampir menyentuh dadanya, bersabda: "Wahai manusia, tenanglah! Kebaktian tidak diraih dengan tergesa-gesa."'

167.iwh_en: It was narrated that a man who had emigrated from some regions was mentioned to the Messenger of Allah ß, and the Prophet ß said: 'He is one of the best of those who emigrate.' Then he died in an un-Muslim land, so the Prophet ß was told about that. He said: 'To Allah he belongs. He died in his emigration (hijra).'
167.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang pria yang berhijrah dari beberapa wilayah disebutkan kepada Rasulullah ß, dan Nabi ß bersabda: 'Ia adalah salah satu yang terbaik dari orang-orang yang berhijrah.' Kemudian ia meninggal di wilayah yang bukan Muslim, sehingga Nabi ß diberitahu tentang hal itu. Beliau bersabda: 'Dia milik Allah. Ia meninggal dalam hijrahnya.'

168.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "This plague is a punishment with which Allah destroyed those before you. It remains in certain lands. When you hear that it is in a land, do not go there; but if it breaks out in a land while you are there, do not flee from it."'
168.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Wabah ini adalah azab yang dengan itu Allah membinasakan orang-orang sebelum kalian. Ia masih ada di wilayah-wilayah tertentu. Ketika kalian mendengar bahwa ia ada di suatu wilayah, janganlah pergi ke sana; tetapi jika ia mewabah di suatu wilayah sementara kalian berada di sana, janganlah melarikan diri darinya."'

169.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß said: 'A Muslim does not inherit from a disbeliever, and a disbeliever does not inherit from a Muslim.'
169.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß bersabda: 'Seorang Muslim tidak mewarisi dari orang kafir, dan orang kafir tidak mewarisi dari orang Muslim.'

170.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard Ibn Abbas say: "You have been commanded to perform tawaf but not to enter." He did not forbid entering it, but I heard him say: Usama informed me that when the Prophet ß entered the Ka'ba, he made supplication in all its corners and did not pray until he came out.'
170.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Ibn Abbas berkata: "Kalian diperintahkan untuk tawaf tetapi tidak untuk masuk." Ia tidak melarang masuk, tetapi aku mendengarnya berkata: Usamah memberitahuku bahwa ketika Nabi ß masuk Ka'bah, beliau berdoa di semua sudutnya dan tidak shalat sampai beliau keluar.'

171.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Prophet ß looked out over one of the fortresses of Madinah and said: "Do you see what I see?" They said: "No." He said: "I see trials falling among your homes like the falling of rain."'
171.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ß memandang keluar dari salah satu benteng Madinah dan bersabda: "Apakah kalian melihat apa yang aku lihat?" Mereka berkata: "Tidak." Beliau bersabda: "Aku melihat fitnah-fitnah jatuh di antara rumah-rumah kalian seperti jatuhnya hujan."'

172.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "If you hear that plague is in a land, do not go to it. And if it breaks out in a land while you are there, do not flee from it."'
172.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Jika kalian mendengar bahwa wabah ada di suatu wilayah, janganlah pergi ke sana. Dan jika ia mewabah di suatu wilayah sementara kalian berada di sana, janganlah melarikan diri darinya."'

173.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ß carried him as pillion from Arafah. The people said: 'Our companion will tell us what he (the Prophet) did.' Usama said: 'When the Prophet ß departed from Arafah he placed his feet between the two sides of the saddle and rode at a measured pace, repeating: "Be calm, be calm."'
173.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ß membawanya berbonceng dari Arafah. Orang-orang berkata: 'Sahabat kami akan memberitahu kami apa yang beliau (Nabi) lakukan.' Usamah berkata: 'Ketika Nabi ß berangkat dari Arafah beliau meletakkan kakinya di antara dua sisi pelana dan berkendaraan dengan langkah yang teratur, terus mengucapkan: "Tenanglah, tenanglah."'

174.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ß that he said: 'A Muslim does not inherit from a disbeliever.'
174.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ß bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Seorang Muslim tidak mewarisi dari orang kafir.'

175.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß departed from Muzdalifa at a measured pace, and when he found an open space he would go faster, saying: 'O people, be calm! Devotion is not achieved by rushing.'
175.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß berangkat dari Muzdalifah dengan langkah yang teratur, dan ketika menemukan ruang terbuka beliau akan mempercepat, sambil bersabda: 'Wahai manusia, tenanglah! Kebaktian tidak diraih dengan tergesa-gesa.'

176.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß said: 'Riba is only in credit transactions (nasa').'
176.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß bersabda: 'Riba hanya ada dalam transaksi kredit (nasa').'

177.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he used to travel to his property in Wadi al-Qura on Mondays and Thursdays. His client asked him about fasting those days, and he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß used to fast Mondays and Thursdays. I asked him about that and he said: "Deeds are presented to Allah on Mondays and Thursdays, and I love that my deeds be presented while I am fasting."'
177.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia biasa bepergian ke propertinya di Wadi al-Qura pada hari Senin dan Kamis. Kliennya menanyakannya tentang puasa hari-hari tersebut, dan ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß biasa berpuasa pada hari Senin dan Kamis. Aku bertanya kepadanya tentang hal itu dan beliau bersabda: "Amalan-amalan dipersembahkan kepada Allah pada hari Senin dan Kamis, dan aku suka amalan-amalanku dipersembahkan saat aku berpuasa."'

178.iwh_en: It was narrated that Dhakwan said: 'Abu Said al-Khudri sent me to Ibn Abbas and said: "Ask him regarding currency exchange — did you hear from the Messenger of Allah ß what we did not hear, or did you find it in the Book of Allah?" Ibn Abbas said: "Usama ibn Zayd told me that the Messenger of Allah ß said: 'Riba is only in credit transactions.'"'
178.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Dzakwan berkata: 'Abu Sa'id al-Khudri mengutus aku kepada Ibnu Abbas dan berkata: "Tanyakan kepadanya tentang pertukaran mata uang — apakah kamu mendengar dari Rasulullah ß apa yang tidak kami dengar, atau apakah kamu menemukannya dalam Kitab Allah?" Ibnu Abbas berkata: "Usamah ibn Zayd memberitahuku bahwa Rasulullah ß bersabda: 'Riba hanya ada dalam transaksi kredit.'"'

179.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß said: 'If you hear that plague is in a land, do not go to it; and if it breaks out in a land while you are there, do not flee from it.'
179.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß bersabda: 'Jika kalian mendengar bahwa wabah ada di suatu wilayah, janganlah pergi ke sana; dan jika ia mewabah di suatu wilayah sementara kalian berada di sana, janganlah melarikan diri darinya.'

180.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that it was said to him: 'Why don't you speak to this man (Uthman)?' He said: 'I have spoken to him. I heard the Messenger of Allah ß say: "A man will be brought and thrown into the Fire. His intestines will pour out. He will go around them like a donkey goes around a millstone. The people of Hell will gather and say: "What happened to you? Didn't you order us to do good and forbid evil?" He will say: "I ordered you but did not do it myself, and I forbade you but did it myself.""'
180.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dikatakan kepadanya: 'Mengapa kamu tidak berbicara kepada pria ini (Utsman)?' Ia berkata: 'Aku telah berbicara kepadanya. Aku mendengar Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Seorang pria akan dibawa dan dilemparkan ke dalam Neraka. Ususnya akan keluar. Ia akan berkeliling di sekelilingnya seperti keledai mengelilingi kincir. Penghuni Neraka akan berkumpul dan berkata: "Apa yang terjadi denganmu? Bukankah kamu memerintahkan kami untuk berbuat baik dan melarang kejahatan?" Ia akan berkata: "Aku memerintahkan kalian tetapi tidak melakukannya sendiri, dan aku melarang kalian tetapi melakukannya sendiri.""'

181.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß said: 'A disbeliever does not inherit from a Muslim, and a Muslim does not inherit from a disbeliever.'
181.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß bersabda: 'Orang kafir tidak mewarisi dari orang Muslim, dan orang Muslim tidak mewarisi dari orang kafir.'

182.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I was the pillion rider of the Messenger of Allah ß at Arafat. He raised his hands in supplication, and his camel tilted to one side so that its nose rope fell. He picked up the nose rope with one hand while raising the other to the sky, still supplicating.'
182.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku adalah pembonceng Rasulullah ß di Arafah. Beliau mengangkat tangannya berdoa, dan untanya miring ke satu sisi sehingga tali hidungnya jatuh. Beliau mengambil tali hidung dengan satu tangan sementara mengangkat tangan yang lain ke langit, masih berdoa.'

183.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ß when he came out of the (Ka'ba), facing toward the door, and he said: "This is the qibla, this is the qibla."'
183.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ß ketika beliau keluar dari (Ka'bah), menghadap ke arah pintu, dan beliau bersabda: "Ini adalah kiblat, ini adalah kiblat."'

184.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I entered the Ka'ba with the Messenger of Allah ß, and he sat down. He praised Allah and glorified Him, said Allahu akbar, and said there is no god but Allah. Then he stood up and went to what was in front of him in the Ka'ba, placed his chest on it and his face and his hands, then prayed.'
184.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku masuk ke Ka'bah bersama Rasulullah ß, dan beliau duduk. Beliau memuji Allah dan menyucikan-Nya, mengucapkan Allahu akbar, dan mengucapkan tidak ada tuhan selain Allah. Kemudian beliau berdiri dan pergi ke apa yang ada di depannya di Ka'bah, menempelkan dadanya padanya dan wajahnya dan tangannya, kemudian shalat.'

185.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ß had dispatched an army in a direction but the Prophet ß passed away. Abu Bakr then dispatched them in that same direction, saying: 'The Messenger of Allah ß dispatched you, so proceed as he commanded.'
185.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ß telah mengirim pasukan ke suatu arah tetapi Nabi ß wafat. Abu Bakr kemudian mengirim mereka ke arah yang sama, berkata: 'Rasulullah ß mengirim kalian, maka berangkatlah sebagaimana yang beliau perintahkan.'

186.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ß said: 'I stood at the gate of Paradise and I saw that the majority of those who entered it were the poor, while the people of wealth were detained. Those destined for the Fire had been ordered into it. I stood at the gate of Hell and saw that the majority of those who entered it were women.'
186.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ß bersabda: 'Aku berdiri di pintu Surga dan melihat bahwa kebanyakan orang yang memasukinya adalah orang-orang miskin, sementara orang-orang kaya sedang ditahan. Orang-orang yang ditakdirkan untuk Neraka telah diperintahkan untuk memasukinya. Aku berdiri di pintu Neraka dan melihat bahwa kebanyakan orang yang memasukinya adalah wanita.'

187.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ß said: 'Both the one who performs cupping and the one who is cupped have broken their fast.'
187.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ß bersabda: 'Baik yang melakukan bekam maupun yang dibekam keduanya telah membatalkan puasanya.'

188.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "If plague is in a land and you are not there, do not go to it; and if it breaks out in a land while you are there, do not flee from it."'
188.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Jika wabah ada di suatu wilayah dan kalian tidak berada di sana, janganlah pergi ke sana; dan jika ia mewabah di suatu wilayah sementara kalian berada di sana, janganlah melarikan diri darinya."'

189.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ß used to take him and al-Hasan and say: 'O Allah, I love them, so love them.'
189.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ß biasa mengambil dia dan al-Hasan dan bersabda: 'Ya Allah, aku mencintai mereka, maka cintailah mereka.'

190.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ß said: 'I have not left among people after me any trial more harmful to men than women.'
190.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ß bersabda: 'Aku tidak meninggalkan di antara manusia setelahku fitnah yang lebih berbahaya bagi kaum pria daripada wanita.'

191.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he and the Messenger of Allah ß entered the Ka'ba. He ordered Bilal to close the door, and the Ka'ba at that time stood on six pillars. He went to the pillars in front of him and prayed between them, placing two pillars on his left, one on his right, and three behind him.',
191.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia dan Rasulullah ß memasuki Ka'bah. Beliau memerintahkan Bilal untuk menutup pintu, dan Ka'bah pada saat itu berdiri di atas enam tiang. Beliau pergi ke tiang-tiang yang ada di depannya dan shalat di antara keduanya, menempatkan dua tiang di sebelah kirinya, satu di sebelah kanannya, dan tiga di belakangnya.'

192.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that when the Prophet ß departed from Arafah and came to the mountain pass where rulers and caliphs used to descend, he dismounted, relieved himself, and then performed a brief ablution. Usama said: 'I said: "Prayer, O Messenger of Allah." He said: "The prayer is ahead."'
192.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika Nabi ß berangkat dari Arafah dan tiba di celah gunung tempat para penguasa dan khalifah biasa turun, beliau turun, buang air kecil, dan kemudian berwudhu singkat. Usamah berkata: 'Aku berkata: "Shalat, wahai Rasulullah." Beliau bersabda: "Shalat ada di depan."'

193.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was asked about the pace of the Prophet ß when he departed from Arafah. He said: 'He would walk at a brisk pace, and when he found open space he would go faster — at a pace faster than a brisk walk.'
193.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia ditanya tentang kecepatan Nabi ß ketika beliau berangkat dari Arafah. Ia berkata: 'Beliau berjalan dengan langkah cepat, dan ketika menemukan ruang terbuka beliau akan berjalan lebih cepat — dengan langkah yang lebih cepat dari langkah biasa.'

194.iwh_en: It was narrated from Usama ibn Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß departed (from Arafah) with tranquility and commanded the people to be tranquil.
194.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Usamah ibn Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß berangkat (dari Arafah) dengan tenang dan memerintahkan orang-orang untuk bersikap tenang.

195.iwh_en: It was narrated from Kharidat ibn al-Salt (may Allah be pleased with him) from his uncle that he came to the Messenger of Allah ß and accepted Islam. On his way back, he passed by some people who had a madman in iron chains. They said: 'It has been told to us that your companion (the Prophet) has brought something good. Do you have anything to cure this man?' So he recited Surah al-Fatiha over him for three days, morning and evening. Each time he finished reciting he would spit. The man recovered. They gave him a hundred sheep. He then came to the Messenger of Allah ß and told him. He said: 'Take it, for some incantations are valid.'
195.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Kharidat ibn al-Salt (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari pamannya bahwa ia mendatangi Rasulullah ß dan masuk Islam. Dalam perjalanan pulang, ia melewati beberapa orang yang memiliki seorang pria gila yang dirantai besi. Mereka berkata: 'Kami diberitahu bahwa sahabatmu (Nabi) membawa sesuatu yang baik. Apakah kamu memiliki sesuatu untuk menyembuhkan pria ini?' Maka ia membaca Surah al-Fatihah atasnya selama tiga hari, pagi dan sore. Setiap kali selesai membaca ia meludah. Pria itu pulih. Mereka memberinya seratus kambing. Ia kemudian datang kepada Rasulullah ß dan memberitahunya. Beliau bersabda: 'Ambillah, karena ada ruqyah yang sah.'

196.iwh_en: It was narrated from the uncle of Kharidat ibn al-Salt (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'We came from the Prophet ß and passed by a tribe of Arabs. They said: "It has reached us that your companion has brought something good. Do you have anything that can cure the mad?" We had a madman in chains, so I recited Surah al-Fatiha for three days, spitting after each recitation. He recovered, and they gave us a hundred sheep. I came to the Prophet ß and told him. He said: "Take it, for by my life whoever takes for an invalid ruqyah (charm) has taken improperly, but this is not a charm of an invalid ruqyah."'
196.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari paman Kharidat ibn al-Salt (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami datang dari Nabi ß dan melewati sebuah suku Arab. Mereka berkata: "Sampai kepada kami bahwa sahabatmu membawa sesuatu yang baik. Apakah kalian memiliki sesuatu yang bisa menyembuhkan orang gila?" Kami memiliki seorang pria gila yang dirantai, maka aku membacakan Surah al-Fatihah selama tiga hari, meludah setelah setiap bacaan. Ia pulih, dan mereka memberi kami seratus kambing. Aku datang kepada Nabi ß dan memberitahunya. Beliau bersabda: "Ambillah, karena demi hidupku siapa yang mengambil untuk ruqyah yang tidak sah telah mengambil dengan tidak benar, tetapi ini bukan ruqyah yang tidak sah."'

197.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Whoever takes an oath — falsely, in order to usurp the wealth of a Muslim — he will meet Allah while He is angry with him."'
197.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Barangsiapa yang bersumpah — secara palsu, untuk merampas harta seorang Muslim — ia akan menemui Allah sementara Dia marah kepadanya."'

198.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Ash'ath ibn Qays (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Whoever does not thank people does not thank Allah."'
198.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Asy'ats ibn Qays (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Barangsiapa yang tidak berterima kasih kepada manusia, tidak bersyukur kepada Allah."'

199.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Ash'ath ibn Qays (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I came to the Messenger of Allah ß as part of a delegation — they thought I was the best of them. I had braided hair and gold rings on my fingers. The Messenger of Allah ß said: "O Ash'ath, get rid of what I see on you of the adornment of this world, for you are coming to Allah."'
199.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Asy'ats ibn Qays (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku datang kepada Rasulullah ß sebagai bagian dari delegasi — mereka mengira aku adalah yang terbaik di antara mereka. Aku memiliki rambut terjalin dan cincin emas di jari-jariku. Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Wahai Asy'ats, singkirkan apa yang aku lihat padamu dari perhiasan dunia ini, karena kamu akan datang kepada Allah."'

200.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Ash'ath ibn Qays (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I came to the Messenger of Allah ß with the delegation of Kinda. He said to me: "Do you have any children?" I said: "A boy was born to me on my way to you — from the daughter of Jadd ibn Qays." The Messenger of Allah ß said: "You have a like-namesake of the Companions of the Prophet (Usama ibn Zayd). Name him Muhammad."'
200.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Asy'ats ibn Qays (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku datang kepada Rasulullah ß bersama delegasi Kindah. Beliau berkata kepadaku: "Apakah kamu memiliki anak?" Aku berkata: "Seorang anak laki-laki lahir kepadaku dalam perjalananku menuju engkau — dari putri Jadd ibn Qays." Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Kamu memiliki seorang yang sezaman dengan para Sahabat Nabi. Namailah dia Muhammad."'
